name: Elena Brooks
target_role: Financial Data Scientist / AI Risk Analyst

current_profile.summary: Financial analyst (5 years) in credit risk and forecasting. Advanced Excel, intermediate SQL, basic VBA. Understands finance domain deeply (credit, fraud, reporting). Little hands-on ML; interested in AI for risk and fraud.

learning_intent: Wants to build predictive models for risk, fraud, and customer segmentation. Goal: pair finance expertise with ML skills and learn explainability and compliance requirements for AI in regulated finance.

target_jd.title: Financial Data Scientist / AI Risk Analyst (FinTech)
requirements: Develop ML models for credit risk, fraud detection, and customer analytics
Validate models; manage explainability, bias, and regulatory documentation
Build data pipelines and deploy models with engineering partners
Present insights to leadership and translate model tradeoffs into business decisions

expected_skill_gaps.description: Python basics + data handling; API/auth basics for production workflows.
Prompt/model unit tests, monitoring, A/B testing, regression testing for model changes.
Risk framing; documentation; constraints for model use in financial decisioning.
Data leakage prevention and secure output handling.
If building GenAI assistants for analysts: RAG fundamentals + tool calling.
